core_law: No unregistered move may fire. No schema-invalid move may fire.

field_meanings.allowed_inputs: declared inputs the move may use
field_meanings.applies_when: bounded predicate grammar, no arbitrary code
field_meanings.halt_map: declared halt behavior for failure/terminal cases
field_meanings.may_halt: whether the move may produce STOP(stop_code)
field_meanings.move_id: stable unique identifier for the registered move
field_meanings.non_impersonation: what this move must not pretend to prove/authorize
field_meanings.priority: integer; lower number selected first by selector_priority_v0
